text:
Created attachment 207883
Fix build of graphics/viewnior.

Hi,

the viewnior project moved on GitHub therefore the files were "unfetchable".
Due to being short on time I didn't upgrade to the latest version (which uses a different build tooling) but only fixed the port to be able to build again.

Regards,

Jens
